title: Logo Refinement for Print
description: Enhance an existing logo created on ChatGPT. Love the design but need it made professional. Improve resolution for printing, make edges sharper, enhance colour accuracy. Ideal skills: vector software (AI, EPS), eye for colour, logo refinement.
mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (existing AI-generated raster logo) -> image_vectorize (clean sharp vector edges) -> document_render_vector (AI/EPS + high-res PNG for print)

persona.industry: Artisanal loose-leaf tea blending and sales
persona.voice: Our brand voice is comforting and knowledgeable, like a friendly guide sharing a cherished recipe. We aim to evoke a sense of quiet ritual and natural goodness.

pairs.intended_prompt:
Flat graphic logo for "Emberleaf Teas" — Artisanal loose-leaf tea blending and sales. The logo should feature a simplified, flat emblem of a stylized tea leaf or a small tea plant, paired with 'Emberleaf Teas' as a clear, elegant wordmark. It should use 3-4 flat colors from the palette, avoiding gradients for clean vectorization.
Wordmark text reading EXACTLY "Emberleaf Teas" beneath a simple flat emblem.
Colors strictly limited to: #4A5F4B, #C77C5F, #F5EFE6. Plain white background, centered composition,
3-5 flat solid colors, crisp shapes, no gradients, no shadows, no photo elements, no extra
text besides the brand name. Style: the slightly-soft look of an AI chatbot-generated logo.
